title: agrostis carmichaelii
intro: Agrostis carmichaelii, also known as Carmichael's bent or Carmichael's grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis carmichaelii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially helping to manage diabetes and improve cognitive function. Agrostis carmichaelii is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
